title: Senior devs quit big tech? Hidden costs matter
meta_description: Senior engineers quit big tech for reasons beyond salary — 2026 data on latency spikes, pool exhaustion, and silent failures that drain velocity.
prewritten_tweet:
Most senior engineers don’t quit Big Tech for money.

They quit because the latency went from 50 ms to 1.4 s and nobody noticed for weeks.

https://kubaik.github.io/senior-devs-quit-big-tech-hidden-costs-matter

#Crypto #Tech #Technology #Redis

Hot take: most people skip the measurement step. Agree?
